accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text or accurate context (War Powers Resolution, expedited procedures).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; all assertions trace to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of U.S. Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities with Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The resolution directs action under existing War Powers authorities rather than amending or repealing statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately describes the rule-of-construction carve-outs for self-defense, intelligence sharing, and assistance to attacked partners.

effective_dates.why: The summary captures the material February 28, 2026 date referenced in the exceptions.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the directive to remove forces, the unless-authorized condition, and the key exceptions.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across paragraphs.

concise.why: No padding or repetition; appropriately compact.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names Iran, Congress, the President, and the War Powers Resolution.

correct_figures.why: The only figure stated, February 28, 2026, matches the bill text.
